highlights.summary: Watch out this space for the latest news around Krishnaveni Degree College Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews.

faqs.question: What specialisation does Krishnaveni Degree College offer in their courses?
faqs.answer: Krishnaveni Degree College offers Degree courses including 10 UG and 2 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Krishnaveni Degree College has specializations such as M.Sc. specializations in Computer Science, Chemistry, B.Sc. specializations in Chemistry, Microbiology, Mathematics.

faqs.question: How can I get into Krishnaveni Degree College for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Krishnaveni Degree College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
M.Sc. Candidates completed B.Sc. Computer Science (OR) B.Sc. Computer Science (Honors) (OR) B.C.A. (OR) B.A.Computer Applications (OR) B.Com. Computer Applications (OR) B.Sc.Computer Applications with Mathematics at 10+2 Level from any recognised institute/university are eligible to apply.
B.Com Candidate must have passed 10+2 from any recognised Board/Council.
B.Sc. Candidate must have passed 10+2 examination with Science stream from a recognised board.

faqs.question: How is the faculty at Krishnaveni Degree College?
faqs.answer: Krishnaveni Degree College has been rated 5 for faculty as per reviews by students. This shows that Institute has qualified and experienced faculty members.

faqs.question: What facilities are there at Krishnaveni Degree College in terms of infrastructure?
faqs.answer: Krishnaveni Degree College has been rated 4.5 on Infrastructure parameter. Krishnaveni Degree College offers good infrastructure such as Auditorium, Boys Hostel, Cafeteria, Co-ed Hostel, Girls Hostel, Gym, Hospital / Medical Facilities, Hostel, Labs, Library, Sports Complex, Wi-Fi Campus to students. Krishnaveni Degree College has also been rated 5 for Campuslife.

A:    Courses offered by Krishnaveni Degree College are M.Sc., B.Com, B.Sc.. These courses are in the stream of Science, Accounting & Commerce. Krishnaveni Degree College offers specializations such as M.Sc. specializations in Computer Science, Chemistry, B.Sc. specializations in Chemistry, Microbiology, Mathematics.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Computer - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college was the perfect example of any degree course.

review_content.Placements: 70% of students got the placement in the college drives and many drives were conducted. 250,000 package of the placement company was offered to our students. TCS, INTEGRATED COMPANY, these companies conducted drives at our college. TCS company offered so many job offers at our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs and hostels are new facilities and cool water is available. Weekly, once chicken is served. The hostel is perfect, the food is perfect, and the hostel warden conducts studies in the evening and morning. The hostel strictly prohibited going home. These are all the good qualities of our college hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Mathematics, Chemistry, Computer Science - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely Satisfied with Good Faculty.

review_content.Placements: I am in B.Sc. (MCCS) student. My group is full benefits in Chemistry side and computer side; there are two sides of jobs ready to be taken. The highest package is 1 lakh, and the lowest package in my group is 50k. The students got internship certificates, and 100% of students have internship certificates in Quality through trainers.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in my college, including labs, classrooms, and library, are overall very good and satisfied me. The facilities of my hostel are very good. The food is also very tasty and delicious. Medical facilities are available in our hostel and college. Every Saturday, the last two classes are games classes to learn how to play games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Joining Krishnaveni Degree College is a step towards achieving dreams.

review_content.Placements: In my college, about 90% of students have seen success in their studies. According to placements, it is the right college for students. A minimum salary of Rs. 20,000 per month is available. Top companies, like Deloitte, are available for us to achieve our dreams. We all completed our internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Inforamtion about faculty members is very good. They teach well, and it is easy to understand. They encourage all the students effectively. There are no problems with the infrastructure. All labs and libraries are available. There are no network problems. Hostels are good, and they provide healthy food for us.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in Computer - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent in terms of fees and now it is converted into an autonomous institute.

review_content.Placements: 30-40% of our seniors got placed from this course. 2 lacs per annum is the highest package offered and 1.75 lacs per annum is the lowest package offered in my course. TCS and Wipro are the top recruiting companies. 90% students got internships and almost all of them were in private companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Overall, there are 3 computer labs in our campus and the other campuses have separate labs. In every class, there is a projector. We have the biggest Library in our college. Hostel facilities are good providing accommodation with 3 time meals and evening snacks. On Sunday, we get chicken.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Very satisfied, you can also join and turn your career into a bright future.

review_content.Placements: It is good to join because most of the companies are coming to college placement cell. So it is better to join in our college. Also it is helpful for our future. Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, Amazon, ILM, ICEC, etc. are the top recruiting companies of the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a library facility which covers maximum books regarding education and practical knowledge so instead of studying large material based questions we can also read the textbooks in the library. So every student is able to understand the subject easily.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Organic Chemistry - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college had a good placement rate in 2020.

review_content.Placements: Our college provided 75% of placements in MNCs with an average salary package of 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were TCS, HCL, and Infosys. The top role offered to students was a technical lead.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college hostel had international arrangements, where every hostel had Wi-Fi, labs, and a library where students got an opportunity to gain knowledge. We had a doctor for weekly checking of students' health. Our college had a huge ground where we used to build our physical health by playing and refreshing ourselves.
review_content.Faculty: All teachers had high standards of knowledge, and they delivered all subjects in a very understandable manner. Every course had very much interconnection with all courses. They were very much comparable to the industry standards. Exams were moderate. The pass percentage was 45%.

admission_overview.college_name: Krishnaveni Degree College Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Krishnaveni Degree College admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingBusiness and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce and Science.Krishnaveni Degree Collegeadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asAP PGCET, BIEAP, and CBSE 12th. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 36,000 - 70,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses is 3 years.

Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.

highlights.summary:
The TG ICET 2026 registration process has started for admission to MBA and MCA courses. Students will be able to register themselves till Mar 16, 2026, without a late fee. The exam will be conducted on May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Below are a few more updates related to the Aurora s Research and Technological Institute:

placements.overview:
The TG ICET 2026 registration process has started for admission to MBA and MCA courses. Students will be able to register themselves till Mar 16, 2026, without a late fee. The exam will be conducted on May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Founded in 1999, Aurora's Research and Technological Institute is a private institute. It is located in Warangal, Telangana. The institute is accredited with AICTE. Aurora's Research and Technological Institute provides UG, PG and After 10th courses in Full Time mode. It provides 21 courses across specialisations such as Agriculture & Farm Engineering, Automobile Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering and Control Systems. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and After 10th Diploma. Aurora's Research and Technological Institute fees ranges between INR 46,500 to 2,80,000. The student intake for these courses is 1273. Aurora's Research and Technological Institute offers these course across fields such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. Aurora's Research and Technological Institute offers all the campus facilities to students.

Aurora's Research and Technological Institute offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Aurora's Research and Technological Institute offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Aurora's Research and Technological Institute fee structure for all the courses is around INR 46,500 to 2,80,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because there are no admissions, placements and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: The college does not provide placements, and there are no proper courses. The college is beautiful, but the facilities are not available, so students do no get placed. Companies do not visit our college for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is available in the college, and there are below 100 students in the whole college. The college does not provide hostel facility and canteen. There is no proper direction to go to college. The college is good, but the college became zero. The college is not developing, and the admissions are closed. Sports facilities are available, but labs are beautifully designed. The outside look of the college is good, but there is nothing inside the college. All the industry equipment are available in the labs, and all the work is explained by the in-charge.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely disappointed because of the teachers. There are no good placements and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Less percentage of students from the mechanical engineering course got placed. There are no placement drives and top recruiting companies for our course. None of the students got internships from the mechanical engineering course, and none of the companies visited our college for internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are poor facilities and infrastructure for mechanical engineering. However, there is a Wi-Fi facility, labs and average classrooms. But there is a good library. We stay in private hostels, and the facilities provided in the hostel are good. There are all mess and canteen facilities, and sports and games are also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with the college because of the faculty members.

review_content.Placements: The college does not provide placements. Top recruiting companies like Capgemini and L&T Infrastructure visit our campus for placements. Civil and mechanical courses are available. The salary package is not offered to the students. None of the students from our course got an internship because some students are doing B.Tech, some are doing private jobs, and some are not passed out.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides all labs as per the requirement. The college provides survey lab and so many labs. The college provides classrooms for about 3 sections in our course. Medical facilities are not available in our college. All sports like cricket, volleyball, etc., are available for the students. The college provides good canteen. Mess and hostels facilities are not available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of improper facilities and faculty.

review_content.Placements: The college doesn't offer any jobs. Not even a word of placements. There are no recruiting companies visiting our college. We did projects related to agriculture machinery. Only 2 of our friends are doing a job. So the percentage is very less.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided in our college are below average. The infrastructure was not bad, as it was built well. There were no proper labs for us in the final year. Even there were no books available in the library for students. There is no hostel facility provided by our college. Canteen is average. No medical facilities are available for the students. The college organises sports once in a year.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Aurora’s Research and Technological Institute.

review_content.Placements: We have to attend the interviews in the Hyderabad campus. The salary offered ranges between Rs. 15,000-20,000 per month. Placements in our college are best for CSE, and IT students with good salary package. Auroras Hyderabad institute is very famous among all the other Aurora colleges in the Hyderabad and other colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides Wi-Fi facility at medium speed. Classrooms are spacious. The college does not provide hostel facility. It provides sports room, and we can play sports in free time. The library is huge, and we can find many books to gain some knowledge. We get newspapers every day.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the faculty, good placements, good hostel, etc.

review_content.Placements: About 92% of students in our course got placed. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month and the highest salary offered is Rs. 30,000 per month. Software companies visited our campus for placements. Students got placed in industries in Balanagar in Hyderabad. The salary offered to the students ranges from Rs. 10,000-50,000 per month. About 80% of students got an internship in top companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library and playground. In the library, books are available for all students. Facilities are available in the hostel for students. Food served in the hostel is too good. The college canteen is super. Sports kit is also available at our college.

review_summary.college_name: Aurora’s Research and Technological Institute Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because there are no admissions, placements and faculty members.

content.Placements: The college does not provide placements, and there are no proper courses. The college is beautiful, but the facilities are not available, so students do no get placed. Companies do not visit our college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is available in the college, and there are below 100 students in the whole college. The college does not provide hostel facility and canteen. There is no proper direction to go to college. The college is good, but the college became zero. The college is not developing, and the admissions are closed. Sports facilities are available, but labs are beautifully designed. The outside look of the college is good, but there is nothing inside the college. All the industry equipment are available in the labs, and all the work is explained by the in-charge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely disappointed because of the teachers. There are no good placements and facilities.

content.Placements: Less percentage of students from the mechanical engineering course got placed. There are no placement drives and top recruiting companies for our course. None of the students got internships from the mechanical engineering course, and none of the companies visited our college for internships.
content.Infrastructure: There are poor facilities and infrastructure for mechanical engineering. However, there is a Wi-Fi facility, labs and average classrooms. But there is a good library. We stay in private hostels, and the facilities provided in the hostel are good. There are all mess and canteen facilities, and sports and games are also available.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with the college because of the faculty members.

content.Placements: The college does not provide placements. Top recruiting companies like Capgemini and L&T Infrastructure visit our campus for placements. Civil and mechanical courses are available. The salary package is not offered to the students. None of the students from our course got an internship because some students are doing B.Tech, some are doing private jobs, and some are not passed out.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides all labs as per the requirement. The college provides survey lab and so many labs. The college provides classrooms for about 3 sections in our course. Medical facilities are not available in our college. All sports like cricket, volleyball, etc., are available for the students. The college provides good canteen. Mess and hostels facilities are not available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because of improper facilities and faculty.

content.Placements: The college doesn't offer any jobs. Not even a word of placements. There are no recruiting companies visiting our college. We did projects related to agriculture machinery. Only 2 of our friends are doing a job. So the percentage is very less.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided in our college are below average. The infrastructure was not bad, as it was built well. There were no proper labs for us in the final year. Even there were no books available in the library for students. There is no hostel facility provided by our college. Canteen is average. No medical facilities are available for the students. The college organises sports once in a year.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of Aurora’s Research and Technological Institute.

content.Placements: We have to attend the interviews in the Hyderabad campus. The salary offered ranges between Rs. 15,000-20,000 per month. Placements in our college are best for CSE, and IT students with good salary package. Auroras Hyderabad institute is very famous among all the other Aurora colleges in the Hyderabad and other colleges.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides Wi-Fi facility at medium speed. Classrooms are spacious. The college does not provide hostel facility. It provides sports room, and we can play sports in free time. The library is huge, and we can find many books to gain some knowledge. We get newspapers every day.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Technocrats Institute of Technology and Science offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Pharma and UG Diploma. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Technocrats Institute of Technology and Science offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fees for Technocrats Institute of Technology and Science courses range between INR 30,000 to 1,86,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Technocrats Institute of Technology and Science has courses such as B.Tech, UG Diploma, After 1th Diploma, MCA, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech which are primarily in the stream of Engineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies. Technocrats Institute of Technology and Science has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Information Technology, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, UG Diploma specializations in Mechanical Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Electrical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Power Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good college with fewer expectations.

review_content.Placements: The group provides excellent placement opportunities to its students. Every year, a minimum of 70% of students get placed. For my course, the average package is 3 LPA, and the highest is 12 LPA. Major companies like Capgemini, Hexaware, TCS, and HCL recruit every year. The job profiles of students include analyst, developer, and management trainee.
review_content.Infrastructure: Science infrastructure is a bit older than the main and excellence building. The campus has Wi-Fi with average speed, basic classrooms without smart boards, and labs that are fewer with old equipment, which is not functioning well. In the library, all books are available. The facilities in the hostel are average. The infrastructure is not good, and the food quality in the mess and canteen does not raise any issues. You can't play many sports on campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best groups among all colleges in Bhopal.

review_content.Placements: Placements are above average at this college. 70% of students from my department are placed. Package offered to them on average is 3 LPA, and the highest goes upto 10 LPA. Top MNCs like TCS, HCL, and Capgemini are regularly visiting for placements. Students get an analyst and SDE role in their domain.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of science building is just okay, not highly developed like the excellence and main campus. Although my department has average classroom, labs for few courses, and Wi-Fi is fully functional throughout campus. Library is also there with less number of books. Hostel facilities are similar to other colleges. But the quality of food and snacks is reliable. Limited sports facilities are there without respective grounds.

overview_faqs.question: Is Technocrats Institute of Technology and Science a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Technocrats Institute of Technology and Science is a reputed institute for B.Tech, UG Diploma, After 1th Diploma, MCA, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Technocrats Institute of Technology and Science has a review rating of 3.7 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.9 on campuslife, 3.6 on placements, 3.7 on faculty and 4 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Technocrats Institute of Technology and Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: As I want to do something in AI, with my low JEE percentile.

content.Placements: 100 percent placement, if you regularly attend college and T&P Classes and give weekly tests in T&P classes. The placement percentage varies year to year, but recently, 80-85 percent of students got placed from Bhopal. The average package is around 3 LPA, and the highest package is reported to be 9.5 LPA. So the overall placement percentage of Technocrats Institute is quite good.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very well educated and helpful in everything. Technocrats Institute of Technology has a very beautiful infrastructure, and Wi-Fi and smart classes are available in the college. The laboratories are designed very nicely according to AICTE standards. A 1000-seat auditorium is available. The hostel and mess are average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Average college with great placement.

content.Placements: College placements are really good. 75% of students from my branch were placed last year. Top MNCs are recruiting every year with a great average package of 3 LPA, and the highest is somewhere between 10-15 LPA. The roles they assigned to students are trainee, associate, and analyst. Internships are getting really hard as campus students move to online opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: My building is average-looking with low-class infrastructure, and the departments are not well structured. Wi-Fi not working or damaged, low seating in classrooms, no projector, and no advanced computer labs. Only the library is in the right condition, and the availability of books is easy and smooth. In the hostel, the infrastructure is not good, just average. The food is average, not too good in the mess and canteen; various items are available. Limited sports facilities within the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college with fewer expectations.

content.Placements: The group provides excellent placement opportunities to its students. Every year, a minimum of 70% of students get placed. For my course, the average package is 3 LPA, and the highest is 12 LPA. Major companies like Capgemini, Hexaware, TCS, and HCL recruit every year. The job profiles of students include analyst, developer, and management trainee.
content.Infrastructure: Science infrastructure is a bit older than the main and excellence building. The campus has Wi-Fi with average speed, basic classrooms without smart boards, and labs that are fewer with old equipment, which is not functioning well. In the library, all books are available. The facilities in the hostel are average. The infrastructure is not good, and the food quality in the mess and canteen does not raise any issues. You can't play many sports on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: One of the best groups among all colleges in Bhopal.

content.Placements: Placements are above average at this college. 70% of students from my department are placed. Package offered to them on average is 3 LPA, and the highest goes upto 10 LPA. Top MNCs like TCS, HCL, and Capgemini are regularly visiting for placements. Students get an analyst and SDE role in their domain.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of science building is just okay, not highly developed like the excellence and main campus. Although my department has average classroom, labs for few courses, and Wi-Fi is fully functional throughout campus. Library is also there with less number of books. Hostel facilities are similar to other colleges. But the quality of food and snacks is reliable. Limited sports facilities are there without respective grounds.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Without thinking too much, you can take admission in this college.

content.Placements: As far as the percentage of students who were placed is concerned, 84% of students got placed. The highest package offered was 14 LPA, the lowest was 3.5 LPA, and the average package was 5-5.5 LPA. The most influential companies in my course were Infosys, TCS, IBM, etc. 60% of students got internships from my course at Capgemini. The topmost role offered in my course was MD.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in my department are amazing, with excellent Wi-Fi availability without any interruptions. There are different types of labs to do your practical work, and the classrooms are also very large in size with good air conditioning. The library is also top-notch. The quality of food available in my mess and canteen is outstanding, and there are no complaints about it. There is a variety of food available. Medical facilities are also amazing; you don't have to worry in any emergency case. There are many sports to play, whatever you want to play.

admission_process.title: Technocrats Institute of Technology and Science Admission Process 2025

paragraphs:
Technocrats Institute of Technology and Science course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theTechnocrats Institute of Technology and Scienceapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG, PG and After 10th programmes in fields of Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software, and more. To know about the eligibility of Technocrats Institute of Technology and Science courses, students can visit the website.

Technocrats Institute of Technology and Science fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for Technocrats Institute of Technology and Science fees is online. Interested candidates can check below for more details on Technocrats Institute of Technology and Science admission:

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

Technocrats Institute of Technology and Science cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 788743 and 1474572 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. reviews.review_heading: Best college in Bhopal to get admission to.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available all the time, whenever you want to use it. There are a number of labs for all subjects where you can go and do your lab-related work. Classrooms are also air-conditioned, and there is a big library as well. The quality of food available in my mess and canteen is acceptable, ranging from good to decent. Medical facilities are also very satisfying. Additionally, there is a sports ground where you can play your favorite games.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best tier 3 college in our city.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is pretty good compared to other colleges. Classrooms, dedicated labs, and the library are all fully air-conditioned and well-maintained with bench desks. Hostel facilities are available for boys on campus and girls outside the campus. The food quality in the mess or canteen is good, and there is a variety of options for students. Sports facilities are not good due to the unavailability of preferred playgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the college are the best in Bhopal among all private colleges. There is 24/7 Wi-Fi available for the students, and a huge library is also available for study and extra work related to books. The quality of food is decent; it's not as good as it should be. Medical facilities are top-notch, and the sports-related amenities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Neither a very good option nor the worst.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is too good. Labs of different departments, classrooms, and the library, everything is available here. You can also get the college hostel. Sports games are conducted regularly. Events are also conducted regularly, including freshers' parties and all that.

reviews.review_heading: This college has good infrastructure and above average placement ratio.
reviews.review_text: College provides good Wi-Fi, smart classroom, libraries, labs, playground, and gym area. In hostel facility, you will get good food. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games like cricket, football, basketball, badminton, table tennis, etc., are available. Time for extra activities in the hostel is 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM.

reviews.review_heading: They take extra fees up to Rs. 60,000.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the college hostel is good and the food provided by the institution is also good. The campus is not too clear as more infrastructure is building up but still, all the classes and the collidore are clear and get room daily. Faculty members are very helpful.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure of our college were good and better according to the courses or departments. The college has labs, classrooms, a library, auditorium, machines labs, computer and IT labs were good. The hostel facilities are good. The hostel food is good. Medical facilities were good even as sports and games were played on the grounds of the college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, but the faculty is average, not the best. The campus is also not good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and classrooms are available on campus. The hostel offers good facilities, and there is also a ground for sports and other activities. However, the canteen food is not satisfactory, and the medical facilities are average. The on-campus health centers provide basic medical care, emergency services, and access to specialists when needed.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best engineering college with unbeatable placements.
reviews.review_text: We have the best infrastructure in our college. All facilities are available in laboratories of chemistry mechanical, civil, workshops, etc. The library has good infrastructure. We have the best quality of food in the hostel and canteen. They take care of hygiene. We have sports like cricket.

overview_faqs.question: Is Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology is a well-known institution for B.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology has a rating of 4.2 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.2 on campuslife, 4 on placements, 4.5 on faculty and 4.5 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Ram Murti Smarak College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and curriculum.

content.Placements: 100% placement is offered on the campus. The highest package is 9 Lacs per annum and the lowest is 2.5 Lacs per annum. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro etc. All the students get internship in good companies. Faculty members are very supportive.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is very good and has great infrastructure. Fully Wi-Fi enabled campus is provided for the students. Good labs, classroom and library are provided for the students. The hostel is well furnished and single occupancy is provided. Canteen, medical and sports facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college, and I believe that this is one of the best colleges in Lucknow.

content.Placements: About 60 students are placed in this course. The highest salary package offered is about 7 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2-3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Google, TCS, Microsoft, Yahoo, etc. There are very good lab facilities and very well knowledgeable faculty members. The salary package offered in our course is 3-6 LPA. About 40% of the students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is better than all the other colleges in Lucknow. Classrooms are highly digitalised. Labs are very good to perform practicals. Hostel and accommodation is nice as per the charges. Mess service is really great.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: If you want to get a degree, then you are welcome here, but placements are unavailable.

content.Placements: Placements in college are not good. So if you only want to study and get a degree, then it is your kind of college. You will hear about only TCS and some other IT companies when it comes to the placements. If you are in some other branches like mechanical or civil, then you have no scope of placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the front building is good, and that is what is visible from the front. But remaining other department buildings are just built wherever they got the place. The condition of the gym is not good. There was certain fake information at the prospectus related to infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of our faculty members.

content.Placements: The placement rate is around 90%. The highest salary package offered was Rs. 35,000 per month. The average academic score of the students was 92%. Many companies such as Wipro, TCS, Capgemini, ANA, and Textron etc., visit the campus for placements. Around 90% of the students got placed from our batch. The lowest salary package offered was Rs. 14,000 per month. Students are mostly offered the roles of a software engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Wi-Fi facility is also available in the labs. You can use it anytime. Mobiles and headphones are also allowed on the campus. Our classrooms are well-maintained. Quality of food served is also good. I didn't face any issues during my tenure at the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The review of SRMS College of Engineering and Technology (SRMSCET Lucknow).

content.Placements: Our college offers 100% placements in good companies. The placement head is very co-operative. They also help students in enhancing their skills and crack any type of interview and face any competitions. They prepare students well to build their careers.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Rooms are allocated on single-occupancy bases, and each room is available with attached washrooms. Each floor has its own common room along with TV facilities. Every room is enabled with the LAN facility. All the classrooms available here are air-conditioned. The food served here is tasty and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is very good and has great infrastructure. Fully Wi-Fi enabled campus is provided for the students. Good labs, classroom and library are provided for the students. The hostel is well furnished and single occupancy is provided. Canteen, medical and sports facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college, and I believe that this is one of the best colleges in Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is better than all the other colleges in Lucknow. Classrooms are highly digitalised. Labs are very good to perform practicals. Hostel and accommodation is nice as per the charges. Mess service is really great.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to get a degree, then you are welcome here, but placements are unavailable.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the front building is good, and that is what is visible from the front. But remaining other department buildings are just built wherever they got the place. The condition of the gym is not good. There was certain fake information at the prospectus related to infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of our faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Wi-Fi facility is also available in the labs. You can use it anytime. Mobiles and headphones are also allowed on the campus. Our classrooms are well-maintained. Quality of food served is also good. I didn't face any issues during my tenure at the college.

reviews.review_heading: The review of SRMS College of Engineering and Technology (SRMSCET Lucknow).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Rooms are allocated on single-occupancy bases, and each room is available with attached washrooms. Each floor has its own common room along with TV facilities. Every room is enabled with the LAN facility. All the classrooms available here are air-conditioned. The food served here is tasty and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SRMSCET, Lucknow.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good with Wi-Fi enabled and well-equipped labs. Wi-Fi routers are placed everywhere on the campus with good bandwidth. Classrooms are spacious and have good quality benches and board. Seminar halls in the college are good. Labs are well-equipped with the latest equipment. Food provided is better than most of the colleges.

reviews.review_heading: SRMS Bareilly Review, A must go college for all geeks who want to earn scholarship every semester.
reviews.review_text: Infra was awesome, SRMS was having the biggest campus in Bareilly. Medical college was also accessible and close to engineering campus. There was temple too, hostel, professor's apartment also in vicinity, Whole place was identified with the name of Shri ram murti.

reviews.review_heading: College life and enjoy and take placement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure here is good there is well-equipped lab and seminar room, library some other rooms have AC in sports there is circlet, football, tennis, squash, volleyball, basketball etc. Stadium which help you to remove stress. Zest and ammod two cultural fest are organised here for entertainment and tecvyom and comptech are for your to check technical knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent environment and a place to nurture yourself under strict rules.
reviews.review_text: The college has an excellent infrastructure, with the availability of all modern equipment. Since the campus was established in 2011 itself, it is a modern one. The classrooms have comfortable seats and projector facilities. The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. The canteen is not much adequate, but students can go out after the college hours and enjoy delicious items from the outskirts of Lucknow. The college maintains a sports ground, basketball court, multi-purpose hall for carrom, chess, badmin...

reviews.review_heading: The college is good with the good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college is provided with the Wi-Fi facility to enable digital, extra learning, and experiences. The highly updated labs and library are for the students to enhance the liberal learning. The medical facilities are available, and the dispensary is available for any emergency. For physical fitness and sports, there are the activities in the sports area MPH. The canteen and the mess are included for the students and the faculty members. The hostel is provided for the students from the outside.

reviews.review_heading: The condition of the private college and their reality.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of the college was average.
There was only one major building, and the rest of the college is always under construction. The labs were also not properly build and no security instalments in the lab.
The hostels were pathetic, and no cleaning was done regularly in the hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Strict for studies and good as compared to other private colleges.
reviews.review_text: The college has an awesome infrastructure. All the facilities are available, sports, medical, the hostel is good and always serve healthy food. The laboratories are clean and equipped with all required equipment, and numerous computers are there and labs, so you will never worry about the internet and stuff related to it.  The classrooms, auditorium, playgrounds and everything are perfect.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a fantastic college.
reviews.review_text: The college has an awesome infrastructure. Also, its auditorium is far better than the PVR cinemas. The libraries also open until 11 pm. There are also canteens and parks which are good. There will be an ECO-friendly environment with excellent labs for all branches, especially for the automobile labs. Also, the CS labs are quite excellent. Overall, the ratings of the college are good.

reviews.review_heading: SRMS review from a B.Tech student.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good and impressive. There is space for everything like sports, gym, temple, small shops and a canteen. The garden is good with a variety of plants. We have a very large parking area. It is a really good place to spend some time with your friends along with studies. This college is located on the outskirts of Bareilly and is calm.

reviews.review_heading: My memory lane with the college.
reviews.review_text:
It has good infrastructure in terms of classes, labs and training development cell. The trainers are always there to help students to make them up to date according to the market. 
They plan many visits to the corporate industry for the students to learn about the IT culture and its work environment.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied with the placements in the last year.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% of students will join in our course. The highest salary package offered is 2.3 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA. The average salary package offered is 2 LPA. HCl and MNC companies visit our campus for placements of CSE branch. Roles like an assistant, etc., were offered to students, but not roles like HR, etc. Almost 25% of the students did an internship in HCL on their own. The college doesn't provide information about internships. Students do internships on their own.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are above average. There is a Wi-Fi network which is connected with Jio network. Labs are equipped Wi-Fi 24 hours for systems. Classrooms will have high security, and they are CCTV surveillance. The library is available here. Hostel facilities are average. The food served in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are not available in our college. Sports and games are available here.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: The college provides the best facilities.

review_content.Placements: We haven't got any company for the drives in our college to attend. If the drives have conducted in our college, maybe half of the percentage in our class get selected. As we haven't attended any drive, I don't know about the salary package. We have many top recruiting companies for our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: I think we have chosen the best course, and we have good facilities for our course. Labs are good, and labs are provided with Wi-Fi facility. The library is available with many books, and also the systems are available in our library. The quality of the food will be good as I am a day scholar, so I don't have much knowledge about the hostel.

Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.

overview_faqs.answer: Krishnaveni Engineering College For Women is a well-known institution for M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Krishnaveni Engineering College For Women has a rating of 3.4 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 2.9 on campuslife, 2.6 on placements, 3.7 on faculty and 3.4 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Krishnaveni Engineering College For Women Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The lectures always helpful but not management.

content.Placements: Software developer, the highest salary is 6lpa Low sal is 12lpa We didn't get any placement in our College due pandamic we compled those days in at home only We didn't get any internship actually our college students don't know what is internship what are use of it. After completing of our college we get to know about internship, how Much that is important to software filed.
content.Infrastructure: Yes, we have all the facilities recording classroom labs system everything. But we don't have not that much hstl facilities the food nad mess canteen everything is absolutely fine but the dong have any medical facilities and sport and games but they will take us to hsptl if their is any emergency .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college as I have learned a lot.

content.Placements: About 30-40% of students in our course got placed. The highest salary offered was Rs. 20,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 12,000 per month. A top recruiting company of our course is Tata Communications. Top roles, like software engineer, associate engineer, boo and system analyst, are offered to the students. The highest salary package offered in our course is 3 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 1.2 LPA. About 20% of the students got an internship in companies like Enthsquare and ABC For Technology.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi and labs with a good environment. Classrooms are neatly maintained. There are many books in the library. Food served in the hostel is better not as much as good. Food served in the canteen is good, and we are very addicted. Medical facilities are perfect with good response. The college provides sports periods, and we will participate in games in events.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with the placements in the last year.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of students will join in our course. The highest salary package offered is 2.3 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 1 LPA. The average salary package offered is 2 LPA. HCl and MNC companies visit our campus for placements of CSE branch. Roles like an assistant, etc., were offered to students, but not roles like HR, etc. Almost 25% of the students did an internship in HCL on their own. The college doesn't provide information about internships. Students do internships on their own.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are above average. There is a Wi-Fi network which is connected with Jio network. Labs are equipped Wi-Fi 24 hours for systems. Classrooms will have high security, and they are CCTV surveillance. The library is available here. Hostel facilities are average. The food served in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are not available in our college. Sports and games are available here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college provides the best facilities.

content.Placements: We haven't got any company for the drives in our college to attend. If the drives have conducted in our college, maybe half of the percentage in our class get selected. As we haven't attended any drive, I don't know about the salary package. We have many top recruiting companies for our course.
content.Infrastructure: I think we have chosen the best course, and we have good facilities for our course. Labs are good, and labs are provided with Wi-Fi facility. The library is available with many books, and also the systems are available in our library. The quality of the food will be good as I am a day scholar, so I don't have much knowledge about the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The best quality education and facilities.

content.Placements: ? 90% percent of students were placed in my course. ? Highest package 8L per annum, lowest package 3L and average package 5L. TCS, Infosys and google ? 70% of students got internship from my course that isTCS and google. ? Hr and marketing and finance.
content.Infrastructure: ? good facilities and best infrastructure available for my course. Labs wifi and classrooms are very awsome. ? the best quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports and games also. Food was very taste and provide healthy food.

admission_process.title: Krishnaveni Engineering College For Women Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Krishnaveni Engineering College For Women admission 2025 is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The institute considers scores in GATE, AP EAMCET, and AP PGECET, etc. for admission. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in several specialisations.Krishnaveni Engineering College For Womenoffers B.E. / B.Tech at UG level and M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM at the PG level.
Aspirants who are selected for admission need to pay the course fees. The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 1,40,000 - 1,72,000. Aspirants have to payINR 54,000 - 86,000for PG courses.

courses_data.name: Krishnaveni Engineering College For Women MBA/PGDM Admission 2025

Find below the key highlights for Krishnaveni Engineering College For Women MBA/PGDM:

courses_data.name: Krishnaveni Engineering College For Women M.E./M.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: At the PG level,Krishnaveni Engineering College For Womenoffers M.E./M.Tech in full time mode. The programme is offered for a duration of 2 years. The curriculum is divided into 4 semesters. Krishnaveni Engineering College For Women M.E./M.Tech admissions are merit-based and students are required to complete graduation. The programme is offered in specialisations such as Electronics Engineering, Computer Science Engineering and VLSI Design. Some other key highlights for Krishnaveni Engineering College For Women M.E./M.Tech admissions are given below: Krishnaveni Engineering College For Women M.E./M.Tech fees isINR 70,000 - 86,000and includes caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc. Some of these are charged only once during admissions. See below the key highlights for the course:

courses_data.name: Krishnaveni Engineering College For Women B.E. / B.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Krishnaveni Engineering College For Womenoffers B.E. / B.Tech for 4 years at the UG level. This course is offered in full time mode. Candidates are offered admission in B.E. / B.Tech based on their qualifying exam scores. The university offers B.E. / B.Tech in specialisations such as Electronics & Communication Engineering and Computer Science Engineering, etc. Selected candidates have to pay a total tuition fees ofINR 1,40,000 - 1,72,000. paragraphs: Mandava Institute Of Engineering And Technology admissionis a blend of merit and entrance-based, depending on the course. The institute considers exam scores for certain courses, while merit achieved in the last qualifying exam is considered to shortlist students for the remaining programmes. Students can pursue a variety of courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels.

Some of the exams accepted by the institute are GATE, AP EAMCET, and AP PGECET, and more. Students must secure a valid score in the relevant exam, and meet the eligibility. Mandava Institute Of Engineering And Technology fees generally range betweenINR 72,000 - 1,72,000. For more updates regardingMandava Institute Of Engineering And Technology coursesand their respective admission criteria, check below:

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with my college life.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. The hostel atmosphere is very nice with 24x7 security. The food menu is very good with delicious items. Overall, the college infrastructure is very good. Medical facilities are provided by the college 24x7, and a doctor is also available on time. Sports and games are conducted every day with a games period in the college to avoid health issues.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its atmosphere, good placements, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: This college has a beautiful infrastructure and the view which was viewed in the center of this college was excellent. The Wi-Fi facilities were also available, and the classrooms were good. The library was good. It provides good computers and the maintenance was good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college in this locality with fine placements & good infrastructure & facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our department are good. It has different classrooms, smart classes, and online classes. We have 4 laboratories and a project workshop. Students have access to all the libraries. The quality of the food served in the mess and canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members here are good, and it's better for financially weak people.
reviews.review_text: Our college is very good. It provides labs with every equipment and library is available with books. Labs are extraordinary, and education is also fabulous. Hostel food and facilities are very good, and the mess food is good at a reasonable cost which will be better for academically poor people. All medical facilities and sports priority are high. Our college is extraordinary in sports, and all facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in the surroundings compared to other colleges.
reviews.review_text: The college has labs. Wi-Fi facility is not available. Classrooms are good with lighting and fresh air. Sports facilities are good. Food served is good but expensive.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely best college because of facilities and mess food and studying.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, library, sports, games, canteen, etc. were available in the campus. The quality of labs and classroom are well and good. The available food in canteen is tasty and good. Hostel rooms are superb. No, I didn't face any infrastructure related issues. The teachers in our college are well qualified and always supported us.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to join this college please enquire carefully.
reviews.review_text:
They are managing with some instruments in labs only and the didn't provide proper Wi-Fi tooo 
* Hostel food is not good basically am not a hosteler my friends daily saying our food is not good one day at that time I took my friend mess card and went to mess and just tasted that food as soon as I through it in dustbin.

AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. degrees obtained through Distance/Weekend mode are not eligible. answer.text: King College of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engg./Information Technology/Computer Science and Engg./Software Engineering/Computer and Communication Engg. Candidate belonging to reserved category must have 45% in qualifying examination. Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. degrees obtained through Distance/Weekend mode are not eligible. Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible. Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor's degree of minimum 3 years duration with minimum 50% (45 % for reserved category). The qualifying degree examination can be 10+2+3/4/5 years pattern or 10+3 years Diploma +3 years pattern or B.E./B.Tech./B.Arch./B.Pharm. or 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates admitted through Lateral Entry in degree courses are not eligible. Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible. Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a perfect infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: About 60% of the students from our course got placed with the help of our college reputation. The remaining 40% of the students have joined in jobs on their own. We gained more knowledge from staff members. Best companies like TCS, Bosch, HCL, Dell, TVS and many more are invited by staff members to offer placements for us.
review_content.Infrastructure: The canteen has an open space here, and there is a good infrastructure in it. There are moderate classrooms, and there is a separate Wi-Fi enabled seminar room. Many seminars and video classes are conducted in our college. Our college is eco-friendly, and there is not even a single disappointing thing.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good facilities but bad placements.

review_content.Placements: Almost 40% to 50% of students get training in the first year. Salaries and stipends offered to students and range from Rs. 8,000 per month - Rs. 16,000 per month. Students are placed according to their efficiency, marks, skills, and knowledge. The campus is well disciplined and safety. Almost 80% of the students got placed in Zohoransky, Motherson, Watertec, Adroit, Prominence, India Japan Lightnings, Valeo, TVS, and Brakes India.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides many facilities. Lathe, milling, drilling, grinding, surface/cylindrical grinding, vices, and measuring instruments are available for students. But Wi-Fi is not available. Classrooms are available, and the library is not satisfactory. Hostel in our college is good, but the food served is a bit bad. Sports committee is good, but sports instruments available are not of good quality.

review_summary.college_name: Ranganathan Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: One can become a great student in this college.

content.Placements: Many companies visit the campus to recruit students. Students can get a chance to join the companies through campus placements. Companies which are famous worldwide select the students based on their abilities.
content.Infrastructure: The college is beautiful. The campus surrounding is highly attractive. The college provides high-speed Wi-Fi facility. It has one of the biggest libraries which always provides a new addition compound. Smart classrooms and smart seminar halls are available in the college. Hostels are very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a perfect infrastructure.

content.Placements: About 60% of the students from our course got placed with the help of our college reputation. The remaining 40% of the students have joined in jobs on their own. We gained more knowledge from staff members. Best companies like TCS, Bosch, HCL, Dell, TVS and many more are invited by staff members to offer placements for us.
content.Infrastructure: The canteen has an open space here, and there is a good infrastructure in it. There are moderate classrooms, and there is a separate Wi-Fi enabled seminar room. Many seminars and video classes are conducted in our college. Our college is eco-friendly, and there is not even a single disappointing thing.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good facilities but bad placements.

content.Placements: Almost 40% to 50% of students get training in the first year. Salaries and stipends offered to students and range from Rs. 8,000 per month - Rs. 16,000 per month. Students are placed according to their efficiency, marks, skills, and knowledge. The campus is well disciplined and safety. Almost 80% of the students got placed in Zohoransky, Motherson, Watertec, Adroit, Prominence, India Japan Lightnings, Valeo, TVS, and Brakes India.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides many facilities. Lathe, milling, drilling, grinding, surface/cylindrical grinding, vices, and measuring instruments are available for students. But Wi-Fi is not available. Classrooms are available, and the library is not satisfactory. Hostel in our college is good, but the food served is a bit bad. Sports committee is good, but sports instruments available are not of good quality.

overview_faqs.question: Is CMS College of Engineering a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: CMS College of Engineering is a well-known institution for B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, CMS College of Engineering has a rating of 4 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4 on campuslife, 4 on placements, 3 on faculty and 4 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: CMS College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This college is well known for its hostel food and hygiene.

content.Placements: 80 percent of the students have been placed in this college. The average package is about 15k. Most of the students got internships and also have been placed in several industries. Many students got jobs in many hospital and industries by this course.
content.Infrastructure: The laboratories are very neat and good. The infrastructure of the college is unbeatable. The hostel has attached bathrooms and toilets in every single room. The food is also tasty and hygienic. The playground is pretty bad and it is fully covered with saplings.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: This is one of the best colleges available.

content.Placements: The college gives good placement for our future. Many top reputed companies come to recruit the students. 100% of the students got an internship from our course. Rs.10000 is the lowest package of our course and the highest depends upon the experience.
content.Infrastructure: The campus offers nice hostel and good vibes. The college provides good hostel facilities for the students and they are availed with good quality food. The hostel is near hospital, temple and church. In the hostel 3 warden and 2 security guards are available. The college has separate hostels for men and women.

faqs.question: How can I get into CMS College of Engineering for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
CMS College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.

paragraphs: The total tuition fees of MBA is INR 3 lakh. Candidates are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Candidates will also require to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The total course fee for Impact College Patna BA LLB is INR 3.10 lakh. Candidates have to pay the fee semester-wise. The total fee includes admission fee which is paid only once in the start. Aspirants have to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the college.

The fee for the MBA programme at IMPACT College, Patna Powered by Sunstone is INR 3.2 lakh. The fee structure is sourced from unofficial sources, hence indicative. The fee might cover various academic expenses like tuition fees, laboratory charges, examination fees, library fees, and other relevant charges. It is important to note that the fee structure is subject to change, and candidates are advised to refer to the official website of the university for the latest and most accurate fee structure.

The total course fee for Impact College Patna MBA is INR 3.01 lakh. The total fee includes various components such as admission fee, tuition fee, etc. Admission fee is paid only once in the start. Besides, the students also have to pay university registration of INR 4,000 and examination fee of INR 5,500 per semester, respectively.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Doon Valley Group of Institutes offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, B.Pharma and B.Ed. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Doon Valley Group of Institutes offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fees for Doon Valley Group of Institutes courses range between INR 1,26,220 to 1,54,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    Doon Valley Group of Institutes has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.EdCandidate must have passed graduation from a recognised University/Institute.B.E. / B.TechCandidate who have passed minimum 3 years Diploma Examination with at least 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) subject to vacancies in the First Year, in case the vacancies at lateral entry are exhausted.B.PharmaCandidate must have passed 10+2 examination conducted by the respective State/ Central Government authorities recognised as equivalent to 10+2 examination by the Association of Indian Universities (AIU) with English as one of the subjects and Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics (P.C.M.) and or Biology (P.C.B) as optional subjects
individually.
Candidate should attain the age of 17 years or more on 31-12-2020.The age shall be determined as per entry in the Matriculation/Secondary school or its equivalent examination certificate.
Candidates who have qualified any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India equivalent to any of the above examinations are also eligible to apply.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th examination from a recognised board.D.PharmaCandidate must have completed 17 years of age in the year of admission.

reviews_list.review_title: The college has bad academics and placements.

review_content.Placements: This is the worst college regarding placement records. No opportunity is given to any student so that the students can have a good start to their career. I will not recommend this college to anyone ever. Don't take admission in this college, and if you do so, then your future will be spoiled. The college did not take efforts for the students' placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was average on the campus. The classrooms were spacious to accommodate students. The buildings are surrounded by greenery. The only problem is the available facilities are not up to the mark, for example, the Wi-Fi facility is available, but the students are not given access. Even in computer labs, the speed of internet is slow.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement for mechanical engineering these days. There are a lot of placements for food technology and IT streams. In our batch, some of the batchmates were directly selected from the campus (food technology).
