faqs.answer: Doon Valley Group of Institutes is renowned for its commitment to quality education across various fields, including engineering and management. The institution boasts an experienced faculty with strong academic and industry backgrounds, ensuring that students receive valuable mentorship. Its modern infrastructure includes well-equipped laboratories, libraries, and recreational facilities, creating a conducive learning environment. The institute also maintains strong industry connections, facilitating internships and job placements for graduates. Additionally, Doon Valley promotes holistic development through extracurricular activities such as sports and cultural events, enhancing students' overall growth and making it a sought-after choice for aspiring professionals.
faqs.question: Q: Why is Doon Valley Group of Institutes so famous?

faqs.answer: Yes, Doon Valley Group of Institutes is a recognised educational institution in India. It is known for offering a range of programs in fields like engineering, management, and applied sciences. The institute has gained a reputation for its focus on quality education, experienced faculty, and strong industry connections, which aid in student placements and internships. Its modern infrastructure and emphasis on extracurricular activities also contribute to its popularity among students seeking a well-rounded educational experience.
faqs.question: Q: Is Doon Valley Group of Institutes a known institute?

faqs.answer: Doon Valley Group of Institutes is a reputed institute for B.Ed, B.Tech, B.Pharma, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA, After 1th Diploma, D.Pharma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Teaching & Education, Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Doon Valley Group of Institutes has a review rating of 3.3 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.3 on campuslife, 2.6 on placements, 3.4 on faculty and 3.3 on Infrastructure.
faqs.question: Q: Is Doon Valley Group of Institutes a good college/Institute?

faqs.answer: Doon Valley Group of Institutes is mostly a highly reputed institution that promotes quality education and skill development. An institution such as this one provides an array of courses in engineering, management, and hospitality. It consists of experienced faculty members and modern infrastructure. The placement cell here is very proactive in assisting students in getting the best in the market for internships and job opportunities with leading companies. Apart from this, it also promotes extracurricular activities, which assists in the proper development of a student. Quality perceptions would vary, so it's better to research widely, visit the campus, and seek the current students or alumni for some feedback before making a decision.

review_summary.college_name: Doon Valley Group of Institutes Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: It was sort of okay type college.

content.Placements: Around 10 percent of students were placed small companies came. Not even a single renowned company came that year. I think around 2.4 LPA was offered to few students. I was not selected in that placement. Over all one has to search by himself they don't provide placements.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was okay not too good not bad. No Wi-Fi facility is available. Students were not allowed to use phone in the campus. The hostel food is not good. It was okay type. Canteen keeps on changed no sports events no medical facilities. No sports events.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty. We faced issues with the lack of faculty members at times.

content.Placements: The college offers good placement opportunities to lots of students during the placement season, which lasts for a month. They also provide many types of facilities during the exam, and they also provide good exposure to students for their bright future. Even our teachers guide students for their bright future and their career.
content.Infrastructure: There are a lot of classrooms, labs and library available for the students. We also have a canteen available for students. Our canteen also offers many types of foods items. They also provide good washroom facility, and even the water facility is available in almost all the blocks. There are separate classrooms available for different streams.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: The college has bad academics and placements.

content.Placements: This is the worst college regarding placement records. No opportunity is given to any student so that the students can have a good start to their career. I will not recommend this college to anyone ever. Don't take admission in this college, and if you do so, then your future will be spoiled. The college did not take efforts for the students' placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was average on the campus. The classrooms were spacious to accommodate students. The buildings are surrounded by greenery. The only problem is the available facilities are not up to the mark, for example, the Wi-Fi facility is available, but the students are not given access. Even in computer labs, the speed of internet is slow.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Review of Doon Valley Group of Institutes.

content.Placements: There is no placement for mechanical engineering these days. There are a lot of placements for food technology and IT streams. In our batch, some of the batchmates were directly selected from the campus (food technology).
content.Infrastructure: It has a very good infrastructure and Doon Valley Institutions is famous for this. Lots of online exams are conducted here due to the availability of high-class computer labs. All hostels, cafeteria, library and college building are very good and clean. A Wi-Fi connection is available on the college campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2013

content.Other: College is average. Studies are good for marks point of view. But there is little emphasis on practical knowledge and you will feel that you are in a school not in college. Placements wise the college is very poor. No placement assistance from college side. Very big campus. Yes, there are fests in the college. One thing that is good is faculty. So, if you want to do a degree just for the sake of degree this college is the best option for you. But, if you want exposure then you should go for some other college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty. We faced issues with the lack of faculty members at times.
reviews.review_text: There are a lot of classrooms, labs and library available for the students. We also have a canteen available for students. Our canteen also offers many types of foods items. They also provide good washroom facility, and even the water facility is available in almost all the blocks. There are separate classrooms available for different streams.

reviews.review_heading: The college has bad academics and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was average on the campus. The classrooms were spacious to accommodate students. The buildings are surrounded by greenery. The only problem is the available facilities are not up to the mark, for example, the Wi-Fi facility is available, but the students are not given access. Even in computer labs, the speed of internet is slow.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA - Bachelors in Business Administration - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is one of the best colleges in Delhi.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are low. Egon Zehnder is the only company that came for placements, and only a few of our seniors got selected in trainee and analyst positions. Around 10% of students got placed, and others chose to do post graduation abroad or in GDGWI.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus has a very peaceful environment for learning. There are enough staff members to take care of each student. The quality of food is appreciable. There is enough parking space for students. The campus has 24 hours CCTV surveillance. There are not many things to do in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA - Bachelors in Business Administration - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Not worth the money and time.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements provided in GD Goenka World Institute. There was apparently a placement cell which was very inactive and didn't help the students. The students had to get a letter from the universities to apply for voluntary internships in companies. Basically, the college does not provide any placements and internship opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the only thing that lures students to join GD Goenka World Institute. The hostel is very clean and safe. The hostel rooms are big with TV, fridge and other facilities included. There are people to do laundry, and the food is of good quality.

review_summary.college_name: GD Goenka World Institute Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BBA - Bachelors in Business Administration - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I enjoyed being a part of GDGWI and I'm satisfied with the services they provided.

content.Placements: Placements in the college are good and are offered from different industries. They provide placement guidance all through the year for the students who enrolled for placements. Good salary packages are offered by the companies. The college provides good industry exposure. They always try to motivate the students. The placement rate is quite high.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but it needs improvement in some areas. Overall, infrastructure is well-maintained. Facilities like gym, football ground, cricket ground, and basketball court are available. Mess facility is available for the students who are living in the hostel. The college provides a swimming pool, various indoor games, and a parlour for girls. Small shops for sitting and eating food is available within the campus.

individual_reviews.course: BBA - Bachelors in Business Administration - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: A very good college where we had a good experience.

content.Placements: Placements depend on the students CGPA and their capability. Earlier, very good companies like Honda and TVS offered good placements. But they were dissatisfied with students' performance which ultimately gave a bad name for the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of GD Goenka is good. They provide spacious rooms. There are options to choose from two sharing to four sharing. The cost of the hostel is a little high compared to other colleges, but the facilities are worth it. There are two wardens, and there are two hostels for girls. There are four hostels and four wardens for boys, and they are also good caretakers.

individual_reviews.course: BBA - Bachelors in Business Administration - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Our college is one of the best colleges in Delhi.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are low. Egon Zehnder is the only company that came for placements, and only a few of our seniors got selected in trainee and analyst positions. Around 10% of students got placed, and others chose to do post graduation abroad or in GDGWI.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus has a very peaceful environment for learning. There are enough staff members to take care of each student. The quality of food is appreciable. There is enough parking space for students. The campus has 24 hours CCTV surveillance. There are not many things to do in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: BBA - Bachelors in Business Administration - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Not worth the money and time.

content.Placements: There are no placements provided in GD Goenka World Institute. There was apparently a placement cell which was very inactive and didn't help the students. The students had to get a letter from the universities to apply for voluntary internships in companies. Basically, the college does not provide any placements and internship opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the only thing that lures students to join GD Goenka World Institute. The hostel is very clean and safe. The hostel rooms are big with TV, fridge and other facilities included. There are people to do laundry, and the food is of good quality.

individual_reviews.course: BBA Business Studies - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and satisfactory faculty members.

content.Placements: I was disappointed with the placement programme at my college. Rather than getting a full-time work placement, our college offered us two or three internships with petty stipends. One of them being an internship at Westin Resort in Gurgaon with a stipend of Rs. 3,000 per month. None of my batchmates went for it as we paid a hefty amount in our college and were expecting a better result.
content.Infrastructure: Contrast to the placement aspect, infrastructure of our college was really good. We had fast Wi-Fi, well air-conditioned libraries and classrooms and efficient computer labs along with CCTV cameras in the hallway and various other places. Quality of food was okay. It was simple North Indian food with no variation. One can expect an ice cream as a dessert on an everyday basis. The classes are held through projectors with well-structured powerpoint presentations. When it comes to the infrastructure, it is one of the best. We can't say the same about the food quality.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of GD Goenka is good. They provide spacious rooms. There are options to choose from two sharing to four sharing. The cost of the hostel is a little high compared to other colleges, but the facilities are worth it. There are two wardens, and there are two hostels for girls. There are four hostels and four wardens for boys, and they are also good caretakers.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is one of the best colleges in Delhi.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has a very peaceful environment for learning. There are enough staff members to take care of each student. The quality of food is appreciable. There is enough parking space for students. The campus has 24 hours CCTV surveillance. There are not many things to do in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Not worth the money and time.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the only thing that lures students to join GD Goenka World Institute. The hostel is very clean and safe. The hostel rooms are big with TV, fridge and other facilities included. There are people to do laundry, and the food is of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and satisfactory faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Contrast to the placement aspect, infrastructure of our college was really good. We had fast Wi-Fi, well air-conditioned libraries and classrooms and efficient computer labs along with CCTV cameras in the hallway and various other places. Quality of food was okay. It was simple North Indian food with no variation. One can expect an ice cream as a dessert on an everyday basis. The classes are held through projectors with well-structured powerpoint presentations. When it comes to the infrastructur...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with infrastructure, faculty , and studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is beautiful. The entire campus is airconditioned. It provides 100 Mbps of the internet for students. The classrooms are spacious big and two screens that were always used. The campus has various sports facilities. Gym, squash, horse riding, football, cricket. A recreational centre with pool tables, foosball tables, and computers to play counter strike. Food quality is really good as it caters to international students. Hostels room too were high end with various beds. From 4 ...

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, bad placements, awesome accommodation and food.
reviews.review_text:
The good classrooms, projectors and Wi-fi were available throughout the campus. Hostel rooms were the best I know in the country. Good beds, cupboards and bathrooms. The dining served a large variety of food. The labs had the equipment required. It had all sports facilities and a very good gym and swimming pool. 
So overall, it had a very good infrastructure.

College is good, it provides Degree from Lancaster University, UK, but it is expensive as compared to lectures delivered. The Hostel facilities are very good in terms of cleanliness, and lodging facilities. So it is worth!  Almost all good companies come for campus placements. The Hostel facilities are very good in terms of cleanliness, and lodging facilities. So it is worth!  Almost all good companies come for campus placements.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is the best college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, medical facilities, sports and games facilities are available. Teachers are the best and friendly, and they teach us in the way we understand. The rooms are the best, and Wi-Fi is totally free. Libraries are the world's best libraries with all modern material.

reviews.review_heading: It has an amazing infrastructure and faculty members. I am dissatisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is amazing. You can find every facility here and make use of it. Everything is available for the students. It has a good cafeteria. It is centrally air-conditioned as well with power backup. Overall, everything is excellent here. The only problem here is the lack of transportation choices.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a different way of learning.
reviews.review_text: The college is located in a peaceful environment away from the city. There were enough infirmaries in college and hostel. Doctors and ambulance were available 24 hours. We had free Wi-Fi, good parking facilities, well-maintained classrooms and hostel. Different cuisines of the food were served. It had fantastic sports and gym facilities. There were excellent lab facilities.
